2026-2027.name: Jaycie Say
2026-2027.description: Hello everyone!! I’m Jaycie and I am so excited to be back as one of your co-presidents this year! I love sweet potato fries, sitcoms and anything sanrio 😍 Please reach out if you have any questions, concerns or just want to talk 😋

2026-2027.name: Mehar Saini
2026-2027.description: Hello, I'm Mehar and I’m back this year as one of your Presidents😀🔥If I'm not at school or at the gym, I'm most likely at home playing games, listening to music, and reading (yes all 3 at the same time.) I love to travel and learn different things. If you have any questions or just want to chat, feel free to hit me up 🔥👍

2026-2027.name: Brandon Chattha
2026-2027.description: Hey guys! I’m Brandon, I’m about to enter my 4th year in SoSy. I love riding my bike and learning about computers. I’m a huge nerd and always get fully enveloped in whatever my current hyperfixation is. Right now it’s Attack on Titan… again!

2026-2027.name: Cyrus Jabez Rasos
2026-2027.description: HIII EVERYONE!!! I’m CJ 😀 and I’m a 4th year in CS and an honorary member of SSSS. I love watching various forms of media, especially One Piece and listening to music. Moreover, I also love going to the gym with friends. I’m excited to bring exciting events to SOSY and ensure everyone is having fun!! 🔥👍

2026-2027.name: Laraib Ali Yousfani
2026-2027.description: Hello everyone 😛😛 I’m Laraib and I’m about to start my 4th year at SFU. In my free time I love playing games (especially minecraft and roblox😍) or I’m honestly just going on random side quests. Feel free to msg me anytime you wanna talk (will prolly end up yapping ur ear off 😭). Overall, I’m really looking forward to being one of your Director of Activities this year!! :)

2026-2027.name: Ethan Ke
2026-2027.description: Hi I’m Ethan, a second year SoSy student. For fun I play League of Legends.

2026-2027.name: Noah Zakaib
2026-2027.description: Hello guys, I’m Noah, and I am a fourth-year SoSy student. Outside of school, I love watching movies and playing games, especially map games (mega nerd). I also love going hiking, the harder the trail, the better and I also really love volleyball, especially on the beach.

2026-2027.name: Andrew La Grange
2026-2027.description: Hello everyone! My name is Andrew, and I’m a fourth-year SoSy student. I’m big on playing games, both multiplayer and solo, with my most notable favorite solo game being Hollow Knight! When I am not on the game, I enjoy playing piano or guitar, reading, or playing board games with my family. I really like playing table tennis as well, and I’ve recently been getting into beach volleyball! I’m also a big horror movie enjoyer, so feel free to let me know what scary films are out there 🤩 I’m looking forward to continue working on the SSSS team as a Director of Relations!

2026-2027.name: Mara Liwayway David
2026-2027.description: Hey, I’m Mara! I’m a 3rd-year in CS and honorary member of SSSS 🙂I’m passionate about community-building initiatives, singing, and multimedia. Excited for the year ahead.

2026-2027.name: Ryan Gamboa
2026-2027.description: Hiya! I’m Ryan, 3rd year SoSy student. After rushing straight home after class, I love video games and coding side-projects, with my Djungelskog monkey. I’m excited to be SOSY’s Upper Div Rep!

2026-2027.name: Abdalla Elboraei
2026-2027.description: Hey everyone! I am Abdalla, a 2nd year SoSy student. I love learning new software frameworks, programming languages, and building new projects. Excited for the year ahead and meeting everyone. Hit me up if you want to chat or want a friend.

2026-2027.name: Manpreet Singh Parmar
2026-2027.description: HELLO CHAT (SOSY), I’m still here and still as your first year representative (maybe something else too). Besides from school, I like to play video games, play DnD, and yell at my friends for throwing. A fun fact about me is that I work on a roller coaster and I did a cartwheel on said roller coaster. Overall I’m looking forward to this year.
